title: Laptop battery swelling and warping the lower chassis
description: I noticed this morning that the underside of my corporate MacBook Pro is bulging and the trackpad is hard to click. I think the battery is swelling and starting to warp the chassis. I have unplugged it and am worried about a potential fire hazard.
triage_reason_summary: A swollen battery represents a physical hardware defect and a safety hazard, mapping directly to IT001. Immediate replacement is required.
triage_recommended_next_action: Safely decommission the swollen battery laptop, place it in a fire-safe container, and issue a replacement MacBook Pro to the employee.

title: Cracked screen on Lenovo ThinkPad after accidental drop
description: My laptop slipped off the desk in the meeting room and landed on its side. The screen is now cracked with vertical lines running down the middle, making it impossible to read. The external monitor works, but I need to travel tomorrow.
triage_reason_summary: Physical screen damage requires hardware diagnostics and screen replacement or laptop swap under IT001. Travel constraint elevates the SLA urgency.
triage_recommended_next_action: Assess the screen damage, swap the LCD panel if parts are in stock, or issue a temporary loaner laptop for the employee's travel.

title: Loud grinding noise coming from desktop workstation cooling fan
description: Every time I boot my workstation, there is a loud grinding noise that doesn't go away. It sounds like one of the internal cooling fans is failing or scraping against a cable. I am worried the system might overheat during my rendering tasks.
triage_reason_summary: Internal fan issues require chassis opening and component replacement, which is a physical hardware task under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Open the workstation chassis, check the fans for obstructions or bearing failure, and replace the failing fan unit.

title: Upgrade requests for additional 16GB RAM for local Docker development
description: My current laptop only has 16GB of RAM and it keeps running out of memory when spinning up our microservices architecture locally. I need an upgrade to 32GB RAM so I can test my code without the system freezing.
triage_reason_summary: RAM upgrades and physical hardware modifications fall under IT001 hardware inventory operations.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check laptop model compatibility for RAM upgrade, verify budget approval, and schedule a time for the employee to drop off the laptop for installation.

title: Replacement needed for defective webcam showing distorted green colors
description: During my video calls, the external USB webcam shows a highly distorted image with a strong green tint. I have tried updating drivers and plugging it into different USB ports, but the color issue persists. I need a replacement webcam.
triage_reason_summary: Peripheral hardware failure and replacement is managed by the IT001 hardware inventory desk.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify the defect, retrieve a new external webcam from inventory, and issue it to the employee while logging the serial number change.

title: Procurement of specialized mechanical keyboard for developer accessibility
description: Due to recurring wrist strain, my doctor recommended I switch to an ergonomic split mechanical keyboard. I have the medical recommendation form ready and need to request the specific model recommended.
triage_reason_summary: Specialized accessibility hardware procurement and distribution is routed through IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Review the medical recommendation, check if the requested keyboard model is on the approved peripheral list, and place the procurement order.

title: Failed NVMe SSD drive causing boot failure on engineering workstation
description: My office desktop workstation failed to boot this morning, showing a 'No Boot Device Found' error message in the BIOS. I think the primary NVMe SSD drive has failed completely. I need my data recovered if possible.
triage_reason_summary: Primary drive failure and data recovery assessment requires physical hardware intervention, putting this under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Remove the NVMe SSD, test it in an external enclosure, perform data recovery if readable, and install a replacement drive with a fresh OS image.

title: Wireless mouse left click button completely unresponsive
description: The left-click button on my corporate Logitech mouse stopped clicking today. It feels mushy and does not register any clicks on the screen. The right-click and scroll wheel work fine. Can I swap this for a new one?
triage_reason_summary: Standard peripheral hardware failure is handled by the IT001 walk-up helpdesk.
triage_recommended_next_action: Collect the broken mouse, update the inventory database to mark it as scrap, and hand a new wireless mouse to the employee.

title: Frayed USB-C laptop charger cable showing exposed copper wiring
description: The USB-C cable on my laptop charger is starting to split near the connector, and I can see the copper wiring inside. It still charges sometimes, but I am worried about sparks or short-circuiting my laptop.
triage_reason_summary: Exposed wiring on a high-wattage charger poses an immediate safety and fire risk, handled under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Instruct the user to stop using the damaged charger immediately, discard it safely, and issue a new replacement charger.

title: External monitor power adapter emitting high-pitched whistling noise
description: The power brick for my Dell external monitor is emitting a constant, high-pitched whistling sound whenever it is plugged in. It is very distracting to work next to, and I am concerned it might be a sign of component failure.
triage_reason_summary: Power supply noise and defect investigation falls under IT001 hardware inspection and replacement.
triage_recommended_next_action: Swap the noisy power brick with a matching replacement adapter from inventory and send the old brick for disposal.

title: Asset tag recovery and verification for unlabeled warehouse scanner
description: We have a Honeywell barcode scanner in the warehouse that doesn't have an asset tag sticker. I need IT to look up the serial number in our database, verify ownership, and print a new asset tag sticker for it.
triage_reason_summary: Asset tag management and hardware tracking falls under IT001 inventory management.
triage_recommended_next_action: Search the serial number in the asset database, print the corresponding barcode asset tag, and apply it to the scanner.

title: Missing HDMI adapter from Floor 18 South conference room table
description: I am trying to run a meeting in the South conference room on Floor 18, but the USB-C to HDMI adapter that is normally attached to the cable harness is missing. I cannot connect my laptop to the projector.
triage_reason_summary: Replacement of missing conference room peripherals and adapters is handled by IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Retrieve a USB-C to HDMI adapter from storage, secure it to the conference table cable harness, and verify the display link.

title: Requesting privacy filter screen for HR payroll coordinator laptop
description: As the payroll coordinator, I deal with highly confidential salary data on my screen daily. Since I work in an open office layout, I request a 14-inch physical privacy filter screen to prevent visual eavesdropping.
triage_reason_summary: Physical screen filters and laptop accessories are distributed by IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check stock for a 14-inch privacy filter and deliver it to the payroll coordinator's desk.

title: Overheating issues causing thermal throttling during software builds
description: My laptop gets extremely hot to the touch and the CPU speed drops dramatically whenever I compile our code base. I think dust has built up inside the vents or the thermal paste needs to be reapplied.
triage_reason_summary: Thermal maintenance, fan cleaning, and thermal paste application require physical hardware servicing under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Clean the dust out of the laptop's internal cooling vents and fans, and re-apply high-quality thermal paste if necessary.

title: Broken plastic hinge on corporate laptop bag strap
description: The plastic clip on my laptop shoulder strap snapped while I was walking to the office, causing the bag to drop. Fortunately, the laptop was not damaged, but I need a replacement strap or bag to transport it safely.
triage_reason_summary: Laptop carrying bags and peripheral accessories are managed under IT001 hardware accessories.
triage_recommended_next_action: Issue a replacement shoulder strap or laptop bag to the employee from the inventory room.

title: Laptop keyboard missing physical key caps after key popped off
description: The 'E' key cap on my laptop keyboard popped off this morning and I cannot find it. The underlying switch still registers the letter when pressed, but it is extremely uncomfortable and slow to type on.
triage_reason_summary: Physical keyboard key repair or replacement is handled by IT001 hardware support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check if a spare matching keycap can be fitted, or arrange for a keyboard panel replacement.

title: Headset microphone picking up constant background static noise
description: During calls, my teammates complain that my voice is drowned out by a loud static buzzing sound. I have tested it on other devices and the static is still present. I need to swap this headset for a working one.
triage_reason_summary: Audio headset failure and inventory exchange falls under IT001 hardware peripherals.
triage_recommended_next_action: Collect the defective headset, mark it for audit, and hand a new headset to the employee.

title: Requesting 1TB external SSD for offline media cache backup
description: Our marketing team is starting a major video campaign and my local laptop drive is full of raw footage. I request a high-speed 1TB external SSD to cache and back up my project files offline.
triage_reason_summary: Storage drive procurement and distribution is managed under IT001 hardware provisioning.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify manager approval, retrieve a 1TB external SSD from stock, register it to the employee's asset profile, and deliver it.

title: Damaged power pin in the barrel connector of loaner laptop charger
description: I borrowed a loaner laptop for a business trip, but when I tried to plug in the charger, I noticed the center pin inside the barrel connector is bent and crushed. The laptop won't charge. I need a working charger before my flight.
triage_reason_summary: Damaged power supply for a business trip laptop represents an urgent hardware swap under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify the barrel pin damage, retrieve a matching charger from loaner stock, and hand it to the traveler immediately.

title: Wobbly monitor stand mount causing screen to tilt sideways
description: The mounting bracket on my dual monitor stand has become loose, and one of the screens keeps tilting down and to the right. I tried tightening it with a flat screwdriver but the screw thread appears to be stripped.
triage_reason_summary: Monitor mounting hardware maintenance and replacement belongs to IT001 desktop setups.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send a technician to the employee's desk with a replacement monitor arm bracket or mount screw to secure the screen.

title: Requesting replacement desk pad and wrist rest due to wear and tear
description: The wrist support on my keyboard wrist rest has split open, leaking gel, and my desk pad is heavily stained and frayed at the edges. I request a replacement set to maintain a clean workspace.
triage_reason_summary: Desk accessories and ergonomic padding requests are serviced by IT001 hardware inventory.
triage_recommended_next_action: Approve the request and issue a new desk pad and ergonomic wrist rest to the employee.

title: Defective Thunderbolt 3 cable causing frequent dock disconnects
description: The cable connecting my laptop to the docking station is loose. Any slight movement of my laptop causes the screens to go black and network connection to drop. I need a replacement high-speed Thunderbolt cable.
triage_reason_summary: Thunderbolt connectivity cable defect is handled under IT001 hardware peripherals.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the defective Thunderbolt cable with a new one from inventory and test the dock link stability.

title: Hardware inventory return for departing contractor's phone and tablet
description: A contractor on our team has completed their project and left the company. I have their corporate iPhone and test iPad here. I need to return them to IT inventory so they can be wiped and reissued.
triage_reason_summary: Decommissioning and hardware check-in for departing employees is managed by IT001 inventory.
triage_recommended_next_action: Record the return of the iPhone and iPad in the inventory tracking sheet, wipe the devices, and store them securely.

title: Liquid spill damage on external mechanical keyboard
description: I accidentally spilled some sparkling water onto my mechanical keyboard. I unplugged it and wiped it down, but now several keys (Q, W, E, R) do not register at all. I need a replacement keyboard.
triage_reason_summary: Liquid damage to input devices is diagnosed and replaced under IT001 hardware support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Decommission the damaged keyboard and issue a standard replacement keyboard to the employee.

title: Corporate tablet screen protector shattered after drop in warehouse
description: One of our inventory tablets was dropped in the warehouse loading bay. The glass screen protector is shattered, although the LCD screen underneath seems intact. We need a new tempered glass screen protector installed.
triage_reason_summary: Physical screen protection maintenance is routed to IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Remove the shattered screen protector, verify LCD touch functionality, and install a new screen protector.

title: Damaged pins on VGA-to-DisplayPort converter cable in training room
description: The display adapter cable in training room 1A has bent pins inside the connector. We cannot connect the podium computer to the projector for the upcoming onboarding session starting in 15 minutes.
triage_reason_summary: Bent pins on display cabling before a session is an urgent physical hardware issue under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send an IT support specialist to the training room with a new adapter cable immediately to restore video feed.

title: Requesting dual monitor arms for new desk installation
description: I have been assigned to a new desk, but it only has standard desktop stands which take up a lot of space. I request a dual monitor arm setup to free up workspace and allow vertical alignment.
triage_reason_summary: Ergonomic monitor mounting options are managed by the IT001 hardware setup desk.
triage_recommended_next_action: Deliver and install a dual monitor mount on the employee's desk.

title: Replacement battery needed for wireless presenter clicker
description: The laser pointer and advance buttons on the Logitech presenter remote in Room 3B are completely dead. I think the AAA batteries inside have drained. Can someone replace them or provide spares?
triage_reason_summary: Battery replacement and accessory maintenance is a standard task for IT001 peripherals.
triage_recommended_next_action: Replace the AAA batteries in the presenter remote and check its operation.

title: Defective smart card reader preventing login keycard scans
description: The USB smart card reader attached to my workstation is not lighting up or reading my login card when inserted. I tried connecting it to different USB ports but it seems completely dead. I need a replacement reader.
triage_reason_summary: Smart card reader hardware malfunction is routed to IT001 hardware peripherals.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify device failure, replace the card reader from stock, and test smart card detection.

title: Loose power jack socket on corporate laptop board
description: The charging port on my laptop has become loose. The charger cable plug wobbles inside and only charges when held at a specific angle. I am worried the connection will fail completely very soon.
triage_reason_summary: Loose DC power jack requires physical laptop repair or logic board swap under IT001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Schedule a hardware diagnostic, open the laptop to inspect the power socket solder joints, or replace the mainboard.

title: Damaged carrying handle on primary field diagnostic kit case
description: The plastic latch and handle on the rugged carrying case for our network diagnostic kit broke this morning. We cannot transport the delicate network analyzers safely without a secure case.
triage_reason_summary: Carrying cases and physical storage for IT diagnostic equipment falls under IT001 hardware.
triage_recommended_next_action: Order a replacement rugged case or swap the equipment into a spare diagnostic kit container.

title: USB hub port failure on Floor 19 workspace docking station
description: Three out of the four USB ports on my desk docking station have stopped working. Keyboard and mouse work, but USB drives or webcams plugged into the other ports are not detected by Windows. I need a replacement dock.
triage_reason_summary: Partial docking station hardware failure belongs in the IT001 hardware inventory queue.
triage_recommended_next_action: Swap the defective docking station with a new unit and update the asset inventory records.

title: Broken plastic clip on RJ-45 ethernet patch cord in cubicle 182
description: The locking tab on the ethernet cable in my cubicle broke off, so the cable keeps falling out of the wall port. My connection drops every time I move my laptop. I need a new 3-meter patch cable.
triage_reason_summary: Replacement of damaged patch cords and cabling accessories is handled by IT001 hardware.
triage_recommended_next_action: Provide a new 3-meter RJ-45 patch cable to the user's cubicle.
